summary: Comprehensive testing of Navixy Dashboard new features completed successfully. All specific APIs mentioned in review request working perfectly with 100% backend success rate. Frontend fully functional with all 6 views, real-time map, trends charts, and improved IoT flow editor with drag & drop functionality.
passed_tests: Real-time Map View displays vehicle positions with loading indicators
Trends View displays charts with period selection (week/month buttons)
IoT Logic View with improved drag & drop - 6 node types available
Node connections functionality working with visual SVG paths
Node deletion and connection management working
Navigation between all 6 views working perfectly
Dashboard view with vehicle data and stat cards
Fleet Efficiency view with timeline visualization
Driver Reports view with 3 drivers (POLICE 56974, Leart, Marcio)
Data loading without errors - all APIs responding
Export functionality for fleet stats (CSV/JSON) and driver reports
IoT Flow save and export JSON functionality
All Navixy API integrations working with external API key
